title: My Little Pony Makes its Mark on the Metaverse
text: Roblox players discover Maretime Bay with customizable pony avatars NEW YORK , Sept. 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- My Little Pony trots into Roblox with new game, " Visit Maretime Bay ," in celebration of new episodes of My Little Pony: Make Your Mark , now on Netflix.

title: Hasbro Should Stay Long Hollywood
text: Hasbro should not get out of filmed entertainment, in my opinion. Instead, it should look to further invest in original content so that Hasbro and Entertainment One can increase cross-promotional synergy.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Hasbro (HAS) in Your Portfolio
text: Hasbro (HAS) emphasizes on integrating the D&D Beyond platform into Wizards' business to drive growth. However, inflationary pressures are a concern.

title: Jump Start Your tonies Adventures with Pink Toniebox and Peppa Pig Tonie Set Available Exclusively at Target
text: PALO ALTO, Calif. , Sept. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- tonies® , the company behind the Toniebox, a child's first screen-free entertainment device designed to promote imagination and learning in a huggable little box, is making it easier for families to go on an adventure with global play and entertainment company, Hasbro's iconic preschool character, Peppa Pig.

title: Why I'm Buying Hasbro, Inc. Stock?
text: The company has posted what I consider to be excellent financial results, and I think the upgrade to the next version of Dungeons & Dragons offers some interesting growth opportunities. In spite of this, the stock is now inexpensive, and the well-covered dividend yield is quite high. The last time the shares traded at current PEs, they did well.

title: Hasbro to Webcast Upcoming Investor Events
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $HAS #HASQ3--Hasbro to Webcast Upcoming Investor Events

title: Kenneth A. Bronfin and Edward M. Philip to Retire from Hasbro Board at 2023 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS), a global play and entertainment company, today announced that Kenneth A. Bronfin and Edward M. Philip will retire from the Board at the Company's Annual Meeting of Shareholders in 2023. Mr. Bronfin and Mr. Philip, the two longest tenured members of the Board, have served since 2008 and 2002, respectively. “On behalf of the entire Board of Directors and Hasbro team, I want to sincerely thank Ted and Ken for their years of service to H
